name: BT Catalog
changelog: Smarter SanMar import: instead of skipping whole brands, it now imports only SanMar styles your S&S catalog doesn't already have (matched by brand + style number) — so you get the odd Richardson/Sport-Tek S&S lacks without duplicates. The skip-entirely list now covers just the basics S&S stocks fully (Gildan, Hanes, etc.). Added 'Re-check imported items' to clean up duplicates from earlier runs.
